hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q 'lib/hecks_cli/'; then rm -f hecks-*.gem && gem build hecks.gemspec --silent 2>/dev/null && gem install hecks-*.gem --no-document 2>/dev/null && echo '{"systemMessage":"Reinstalled hecks gem"}'; fi; }
